title: Picture A 2D Digital Illustration
sourceTitle: Create Picture 2d Digital Illustration Michael Jackson
prompt: Create a picture A 2D digital illustration of Michael Jackson in a stylized modern cartoon art style. He is wearing his iconic white fedora with a black band, a white pinstripe suit jacket, a dark blue dress shirt, and a white tie. He is holding up his signature single white sparkling sequined glove near his face, smiling subtly. The background features warm, soft golden bokeh lights, creating a cinematic stage atmosphere. The image has a subtle puzzle piece texture overlay across the entire canvas, with soft shadows and rich, warm lighting.
